name: Post List
description: List of article preview cards with title, excerpt, author, date, and category. Used for blogs, news feeds, and content indexes.

slots.category-filter: Optional row of Chip filters at top for filtering by topic
slots.posts: Card list with each Card.Body containing title, excerpt, Avatar author, date Badge, and category Chip
slots.pagination: Bottom pagination controls or load-more Button via _flex _justifyCenter

command-center.notes: Category pills use cc-label. Post dates use cc-data. Featured posts get cc-glow border. List area uses cc-scanline.
